creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
> All the archives can be browse here, included the archive from the "archived" mailing lists

s/browse/browsed/
s/included/including/
I don't know why there are quotes around archived or what it's doing here. (Aren't all lists mentioned in this page archived by definition?)
It needs a period at the end.

> If you are looking from archives from before the migration you can get them here

Also needs a period at the end.

If someone tells me whether/where that text lives in the doc repo and what should be done with "archived", I can provide a patch.
